content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "String Coloring (easy version)". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1296/problem/E1
constraints: s consists of the characters 'R', 'G', and 'B'
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the length of the string. The second line contains a string s of length n, consisting of the characters 'R', 'G', and 'B'.
content.outputFormat: Output the minimum number of operations required to make the string good.

solution.approach: Use a greedy approach to find the minimum number of operations required to make the string good.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
s = input()
count = 0
for i in range(n - 2):
    if s[i] == s[i + 1] == s[i + 2]:
        count += 1
print(count)
